metaTitle: Sheng Ji for Malaysia & Singapore Chinese: No Travel to Taiwan Required
metaDescription: Malaysia and Singapore Chinese can complete Sheng Ji by mailing 4 items internationally — no Taiwan travel needed for the 5-Year package. Taiwan 3-generation master, ordained 2007. WeChat NSDG521.
metaKeywords: Sheng Ji Malaysia, Sheng Ji Singapore, living tomb Malaysia, Feng Shui Sheng Ji overseas Chinese, best Sheng Ji Malaysia
h1: Sheng Ji for Malaysia & Singapore: Taiwan Master Service — Mail Your Items, No Travel Required
heroSub: Master Lin has served Malaysia and Singapore clients since 2004 — overseas Chinese can complete the full Sheng Ji ceremony without travelling to Taiwan

sections.h2: Master Lin's Deep Connection with Malaysian and Singaporean Chinese

items.h3: Master Lin Zhi-Ying Was Engaged in Malaysia & Singapore in 2004
items.content: Master Lin Zhi-Ying — the second-generation head of the Lin family — was engaged in 2004 by Yuan Zhong Xiu in Malaysia and Singapore to provide Feng Shui and destiny consultation services. This established a lasting reputation and client base across Southeast Asian Chinese communities that continues to the present day.

items.h3: Master Lin Jia-Hua Regularly Teaches in Singapore
items.content: Master Lin Jia-Hua (the third-generation master who conducts Sheng Ji ceremonies) has been regularly invited to Singapore for short-term teaching engagements in recent years, maintaining active ties with Singapore's Chinese metaphysics community.

sections.h2: How Malaysian & Singaporean Clients Complete Sheng Ji

items.h3: Step 1: Add WeChat NSDG521 — Mr. Liang Dongrong Is Your Point of Contact
items.content: Mr. Liang Dongrong (WeChat: NSDG521, email: liangdongrong@gmail.com) is the sole authorised agent for all Greater China and overseas Chinese clients. He handles all enquiries, coordination and logistics for Malaysia and Singapore clients.

items.h3: Step 2: Receive International Material Kit (5–7 Business Days)
items.content: After paying the deposit, the agent dispatches the specialised collection kit to your Malaysian or Singaporean address via international courier (typically DHL or FedEx), arriving within 5–7 business days.

items.h3: Step 3: Mail Back Your 4 Items via International Courier
items.content: Prepare your 4 items using the kit's instructions — hair, nail clippings, blood drops on the absorbent paper, and a worn garment — and mail them back via DHL, FedEx or a reliable international courier to the address provided by the agent. Retain the tracking number and share it with the agent.

The 5-Year Experience package costs RMB 72,000, payable via international bank transfer or WeChat Pay. The agent will confirm the most convenient payment method for your location. International courier costs for the material kit and return items are borne by the client for outbound shipment; the three return items (garment, ingot, video) are shipped back to you by us.

items.h3: Lifetime Package: RMB 500,000 — Requires Travel to Taiwan
items.content: The Lifetime Premium package requires your personal attendance in Taiwan for the full 2-day ceremony. Singapore and Malaysia are well-connected to Taiwan by direct flights (3–5 hours), making it straightforward to combine the ceremony with a short Taiwan visit. Contact the agent to discuss logistics and timing.
